calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Walter Roger Gordon, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Letter by Parole Agent: Larry McQuitta, approving the Petitioner's request for change of name, rec'd in court and placed in the court's file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Tiffany Emon Gordon.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Reset To Aug-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner: Walter Roger Gordon, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Matter is continued to Aug. 3, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to obtain a document from the parole officer, with all the name used and consenting to the name change request.
